\tzpentry{ID4160}{Field Strength Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4160 introduces Field Strength Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \vec{F} = q(\vec{E} + \vec{v} \times \vec{B}) + m\omega^2 r\,\hat{r} \]
